front: What is the role of protecting groups in solid-phase peptide synthesis?
back: Fmoc (base-labile) protects alpha-amino group; removed with 20% piperidine. Side chains protected with acid-labile groups (tBu, Trt, Pbf). orthogonal protection enables selective deprotection. Coupling with HATU/HOBt/DIC activates carboxyl group.
